debug_info.goal:
α✝ : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α✝
α β : Type
inst✝⁵ : Fintype α
inst✝⁴ : Fintype β
inst✝³ : Inhabited α
inst✝² : Inhabited β
inst✝¹ : OracleComp.SampleableType α
inst✝ : OracleComp.SampleableType β
⊢ ∀ (x y : α × β),
    Pr[=x | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> OracleComp.uniformSample α inst✝¹ <*> OracleComp.uniformSample β inst✝] =
      Pr[=y | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> OracleComp.uniformSample α inst✝¹ <*> OracleComp.uniformSample β inst✝]

intro x y
    classical
    have hx : Pr[= x | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> OracleComp.uniformSample α ‹_› <*> OracleComp.uniformSample β ‹_›]
        = (Fintype.card (α × β) : ℝ≥0∞)⁻¹ := by
      simpa using (probOutput_seq_map_prod_mk_eq_mul (oa := ($ᵗ α)) (ob := ($ᵗ β))
        (x := x.1) (y := x.2)).trans (by
          simp [probOutput_uniformSample, Fintype.card_prod, ENNReal.inv_mul_inv])
    have hy : Pr[= y | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> OracleComp.uniformSample α ‹_› <*> OracleComp.uniformSample β ‹_›]
        = (Fintype.card (α × β) : ℝ≥0∞)⁻¹ := by
      simpa using (probOutput_seq_map_prod_mk_eq_mul (oa := ($ᵗ α)) (ob := ($ᵗ β))
        (x := y.1) (y := y.2)).trans (by
          simp [probOutput_uniformSample, Fintype.card_prod, ENNReal.inv_mul_inv])
    simpa [hx, hy]
  probFailure_selectElem := by sorry --simp

    rw [hx, hy, probOutput_uniformSample (α := α) x.1, probOutput_uniformSample (α := α) y.1,

      simpa using (probOutput_seq_map_prod_mk_eq_mul ($ᵗ α) ($ᵗ β) x.1 x.2)
    have hy :

    rw [hx, hy, probOutput_uniformSample (α := α) α x.1, probOutput_uniformSample (α := β) β x.2,

intro x y
    have hx : Pr[= x | (·, ·) <$> ($ᵗ α) <*> ($ᵗ β)] =
